skin_profile.en: Mild dehydration with diffuse dullness across forehead and malar zones.
skin_profile.zh: 额头与颧颊区存在轻度缺水和弥散性暗沉。

notes_texts.en: Prioritize hydration support and avoid excessive thermal stress.
notes_texts.zh: 优先补水支持，避免过高热刺激。

skin_profile.en: Localized redness around nasal and perioral areas with possible barrier irritation.
skin_profile.zh: 鼻周与口周区域存在局部泛红，并伴随可能的屏障刺激。

notes_texts.en: Favor soothing exposure with lower temperature.
notes_texts.zh: 优先采用舒缓型照射，并保持较低温度。

skin_profile.en: T-zone oiliness with visible congestion and mild textural irregularity.
skin_profile.zh: T 区油脂偏多，可见堵塞并伴有轻度纹理不平整。

notes_texts.en: Use shorter sessions focused on congestion control.
notes_texts.zh: 采用偏短疗程，重点控制堵塞和油脂负担。
